card_1.title: Mission
card_1.description: Jibrel aims to leverage the latest advancements and innovations, in distributed ledger and smart contract technology, to develop the financial infrastructure of the future

card_2.title: Vision
card_2.description: Jibrel provides use-case specific blockchain infrastructure components, such as interfaces and explorers, across industries — including; financial services, healthtech and e-governance

card_3.title: Values
card_3.description: Honest and ethical business practices are key to long-term sustainable business. Jibrel prioritizes in-sourcing over outsourcing, and building over marketing
